title: How to withdraw or cancel a citizenship application - Canada.ca
content:
## How to withdraw or cancel a citizenship application
To withdraw or cancel a citizenship application you’ve already submitted, you must
- prepare your documents
- send your request using the correct method
In some cases, you may be able to get a refund for some or all of your fees. Find out if you can ask for a refund .

## 1. Prepare your documents
To withdraw your application
- complete and sign the Request for Withdrawal of Citizenship Application Form (CIT 0027) (opens in new tab) If you applied as a family or a group, each applicant must fill out and sign the form (1 form per applicant, including minors if applicable).
- If you applied as a family or a group, each applicant must fill out and sign the form (1 form per applicant, including minors if applicable).
- get a copy of your fee receipt

## 2. Send your request
Where and how you send your documents to us depends on the type of citizenship application you submitted.
Answer these questions to get the correct instructions.

## Becoming a Canadian citizen (citizenship grant): Use the web form or send your documents by mail
You can send your documents to us through the web form or by mail.

### Option 1 (recommended): Web form
Send your withdrawal request through the web form (opens in a new tab) .
You can send your request by regular mail or courier.
“Withdrawal of Application”
Case Processing Centre - Sydney P.O. Box 12000 Sydney, NS  B1P 7C1
“Withdrawal of Application”
IRCC Digitization Centre - Citizenship 3050 Wilson Ave New Waterford, NS  B1H 5V8

## Resuming Canadian citizenship: Use the web form or send your documents by mail
You can send your documents to us through the web form or by mail.

### Option 1 (recommended): Web form
Send your withdrawal request through the web form (opens in a new tab) .
You can send your request by regular mail or courier.
“Withdrawal of Application”
Case Processing Centre - Sydney P.O. Box 12000 Sydney, NS  B1P 7C1
“Withdrawal of Application”
IRCC Digitization Centre - Citizenship 3050 Wilson Ave New Waterford, NS  B1H 5V8

## Giving up Canadian citizenship (from Canada or the United States) : Use the web form or send your documents by mail
You can send your documents to us through the web form or by mail.

### Option 1 (recommended): Web form
Send your withdrawal request through the web form (opens in a new tab) .
You can send your request by regular mail or courier.
“Withdrawal of Application”
Case Processing Centre - Sydney P.O. Box 12000 Sydney, NS  B1P 7C1
“Withdrawal of Application”
IRCC Digitization Centre - Citizenship 3050 Wilson Ave New Waterford, NS  B1H 5V8

## Giving up Canadian citizenship (from outside Canada or the United States): Use the web form or send your documents by mail
You can send your documents to us through the web form or by mail.

### Option 1 (recommended): Web form
- send your documents through the web form (opens in a new tab) and
- inform the Canadian embassy, high commission or consulate (opens in a new tab) where you submitted your application that you sent a withdrawal request
You can mail your request to the Canadian embassy, high commission or consulate (opens in a new tab) where you submitted your application.

## Online application for a citizenship certificate: Use the web form
You can send your documents to us through the web form (opens in a new tab) .

## Paper application for a citizenship certificate (from Canada or the United States): Use the web form or send your documents by mail
You can send your documents to us through the web form or by mail.

### Option 1 (recommended): Web form
Send your withdrawal request through the web form (opens in a new tab) .
You can send your request by regular mail or courier.
“Withdrawal of Application”
Case Processing Centre - Sydney P.O. Box 12000 Sydney, NS  B1P 7C1
“Withdrawal of Application”
IRCC Digitization Centre - Citizenship 3050 Wilson Ave New Waterford, NS  B1H 5V8

## Paper application for a citizenship certificate (from outside Canada and the United States): Use the web form or send your documents by mail
You can send your documents to us through the web form or by mail.

### Option 1 (recommended): Web form
- send your documents through the web form (opens in a new tab) and
- inform the Canadian embassy, high commission or consulate (opens in a new tab) where you submitted your application that you sent a withdrawal request
You can mail your request to the Canadian embassy, high commission or consulate (opens in a new tab) where you submitted your application.

## Online application to search citizenship records (from Canada or the United States): Use the web form
You can send your documents to us through the web form (opens in a new tab) .

## Paper application to search citizenship records (from Canada or the United States): Use the web form or send your documents by mail
You can send your documents to us through the web form or by mail.

### Option 1 (recommended): Web form
Send your withdrawal request through the web form (opens in a new tab) .
You can send your request by regular mail or courier.
“Withdrawal of Application”
Case Processing Centre - Sydney P.O. Box 12000 Sydney, NS  B1P 7C1
“Withdrawal of Application”
IRCC Digitization Centre - Citizenship 3050 Wilson Ave New Waterford, NS  B1H 5V8

## Paper application to search citizenship records (from outside Canada and the United States): Use the web form or send your documents by mail
You can send your documents to us through the web form or by mail.

### Option 1 (recommended): Web form
- send your documents through the web form (opens in a new tab) and
- inform the Canadian embassy, high commission or consulate (opens in a new tab) where you submitted your application that you sent a withdrawal request
You can mail your request to the Canadian embassy, high commission or consulate (opens in a new tab) where you submitted your application.
